hero.title: Learn Solana Development
hero.subtitle: Interactive courses with a built-in code editor, on-chain XP tokens, and NFT credentials. Your skills, verified on Solana.

features.title: Everything you need to master Solana
features.subtitle: From interactive lessons to verifiable on-chain credentials — every tool a developer needs, built directly on Solana.

courses.title: Interactive Courses
courses.description: Structured learning paths with lesson-by-lesson progress tracking. Prerequisite gating ensures you build skills in the right order.

streaks.title: Learn at Your Own Pace
streaks.description: Study full time, part time, or anywhere in between. Track your learning streaks and stay motivated with daily goals.

editor.title: Built-In Code Editor
editor.description: Write and run Rust, TypeScript, and Python directly in the browser. Build real Solana programs without leaving the platform.

xp.title: On-Chain XP Tokens
xp.description: Earn soulbound XP (Token-2022) for every lesson, course completion, and achievement. Your progress lives permanently on Solana.

credentials.title: NFT Credentials
credentials.description: Receive soulbound Metaplex Core NFT credentials per track — visible in Phantom, Backpack, and Solflare. They upgrade as you advance.

achievements.title: Achievements & Badges
achievements.description: Unlock achievement NFTs for milestones — each with its own collection, XP reward, and supply cap. Double-awarding is impossible on-chain.

courses.title: Structured tracks to take you from zero to on-chain
courses.subtitle: Each course is packed with lessons, quizzes, and hands-on coding — all verified on Solana with XP and NFT credentials.

solanaFundamentals.title: Solana Fundamentals
solanaFundamentals.description: Learn the basics of Solana — accounts, transactions, PDAs, and the runtime.

anchor.title: Building with Anchor
anchor.description: Build, test, and deploy Solana programs using the Anchor framework.

defi.title: DeFi on Solana
defi.description: Build DeFi primitives — AMMs, lending pools, and vaults on Solana.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Superteam Academy.

q1.question: Is Superteam Academy free to use?
q1.answer: Yes — all courses, lessons, and the built-in code editor are completely free. There are no paywalls, subscriptions, or hidden fees. The platform is open-access by design.

q2.question: Do I need prior Solana or Rust experience?
q2.answer: Not at all. The Solana Fundamentals track starts from absolute zero and guides you step by step. If you already have experience, you can skip ahead to more advanced tracks like DeFi or Program Security.

q3.question: What are XP tokens and how do they work?
q3.answer: XP tokens are soulbound SPL tokens (Token-2022) minted on Solana every time you complete a lesson, course, or achievement. They are non-transferable and represent your verified learning progress on-chain.

q4.question: What are NFT credentials?
q4.answer: When you complete a course track, you receive a soulbound Metaplex Core NFT as a verifiable credential. These NFTs are visible in wallets like Phantom and Backpack, and they upgrade automatically as you advance through difficulty tiers.

q5.question: Can I use the code editor for real Solana programs?
q5.answer: The built-in editor supports Rust, TypeScript, JavaScript, and Python with syntax highlighting and execution. It is designed for learning and practice — for production deployment, you would use your local Anchor development environment.

q6.question: How do I connect my wallet?
q6.answer: You can connect any Solana wallet (Phantom, Backpack, Solflare) during sign-up. Your wallet is used to receive XP tokens and NFT credentials. You can also sign up with email and connect a wallet later.

testimonials.title: Trusted by developers building on Solana

t1.quote: Superteam Academy was the first place where Solana development actually clicked for me. The interactive lessons and on-chain XP made learning feel rewarding.
t1.name: Priya Sharma

t2.quote: I went from zero Rust knowledge to deploying my first Anchor program in under three weeks. The structured tracks and built-in code editor made all the difference.
t2.name: Carlos Reyes

t3.quote: The NFT credentials are a game-changer. I can show employers verifiable proof of my Solana skills directly from my wallet. No other platform offers that.
t3.name: Aisha Tanaka

about.title: What is Superteam Academy?
about.description: Superteam Academy is a free web3 education platform to learn blockchain and Solana development. It's designed to help developers kickstart and level up their careers with interactive courses, a built-in code editor, on-chain XP tokens, and NFT credentials. Your progress is verifiable and stored permanently on Solana.

assessment.title: Find what's right for you
assessment.subtitle: Answer {total} questions to figure out which course to start with:
assessment.resultTitle: Don't know where to get started?
assessment.resultSubtitle: According to our assessment, this is the course that's right for you:

q1.question: What is your experience level with blockchain development?
q1.o1: Complete beginner — never written any code
q1.o2: Some programming knowledge but new to blockchain
q1.o3: Built projects with other chains (Ethereum, Polygon, etc.)

q2.question: How familiar are you with the Rust programming language?
q2.o2: Read about it but have not written any Rust
q2.o4: Comfortable with Rust and ownership model

q3.question: What best describes your goal with Solana?
q3.o1: Learn the fundamentals and understand how Solana works
q3.o2: Build and deploy my first on-chain program
q3.o3: Create tokens, NFTs, or DeFi applications
q3.o4: Improve security and audit existing programs

q4.question: Which area interests you the most?
q4.o1: Accounts, PDAs, and the Solana runtime

q5.question: How much time can you dedicate per week?
q5.o1: A few hours — I want to learn at my own pace
q5.o3: 10-20 hours — I want to move fast
q5.o4: Full time — I am all in
